creator: foxfair@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Change state because it should be a misfiled PR: Check the ERRATA info 
http://www.freebsd.org/releases/3.2R/errata.html here. If no objection 
and we all agree with it, I'll close it at next Sunday(local time: GMT+8, 
1st Aug.)
